title: Deduplicate POST Requests with Idempotency Keys in Echo
summary: Deduplicate one Echo POST endpoint with an Idempotency-Key header and a single-process in-memory store.
verification_notes: Executed from the snippet root with Go 1.24.4 on macOS. Verified behavior covers missing idempotency keys on POST, caching and replaying successful responses, separate keys, replaying a response that completes between store checks, separating caller scopes with the same key, normalizing the Authorization header scope for the same caller, conflict responses for in-progress duplicates, retries after failed responses, and bypassing non-POST requests.
